world.name: Forgotten Realms
world.lore_summary: New campaign — character creation in progress.

history_log.event: New campaign started. Begin character creation.

Rathal Ulayra, a High Elf Wizard from Evereska, begins his journey. A scholar of Evocation magic seeking to understand the intersection of physics and arcane forces, he is driven by insatiable curiosity and a desire to find an intellectual equal. Polite, calculating, and chaotic in nature—bound bycreed but truth itself.

CAMPAIGN CREATED: "Echoes of the Arcane" - Character Rathal Ulayra, High Elf Wizard (Evocation School), created and ready for adventure. Character origin: Evereska. Motivation: Understanding magic and physics, seeking a kindred mind. Alignment: Chaotic Neutral. Currently approaching the town of Millhaven on the Sword Coast, sensing discordant magical interference in the area. A guard at the gate has greeted Rathal and is awaiting response.
